case_title: AMERICAN MANUFACTURERS MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. STERLING LEWIS III et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-01-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-22-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN MANUFACTURERS MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS III, STERLING $4,998.21 PRINCIPAL, $95.04 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,318.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
